title: olearia chrysophylla
intro: Olearia chrysophylla, also known as the golden-leaved tree daisy, is a shrub native to New Zealand that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Olearia chrysophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Olearia chrysophylla include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
